headlines.title: China's Energy Future Runs on Coal and Solar

headlines.title: The Oil Benchmark Named Brent Is Losing Its Brent
headlines.summary: The world's most important oil benchmark is about to experience an identity crisis. headlines.title: US Crude Output Sets New Monthly Production Record
headlines.summary: According to monthly data released Tuesday by the U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA), U.S. crude oil production climbed to a record 13.934 million barrels per day (bpd) in April—the highest monthly production rate ever recorded. headlines.title: Beaver Island Becomes Test Site for Freshwater Wave Energy
headlines.summary: The next frontier for wave energy may be far from any ocean.
